title: Systems Engineers (DevOps Engineers)
description:
We are looking for a hands-on On-Premises DevOps Engineer to support and operate our on-prem Kubernetes and container platform for a 1-year project. This role is well-suited for mid-level DevOps engineers with practical experience running production environments, especially in on-prem or private infrastructure setups.

You will work closely with application, infrastructure, and operations teams to ensure stable deployments, system availability, and platform reliability.

Responsibilities

•                     Kubernetes Clusters: Install, configure, and maintain Kubernetes clusters on-premises.

•                     Containerization: Work with Docker containers and containerd for application deployments.

•                     Kafka Integration: Integrate Kafka for event-driven communication and data streaming within our on-premises setup.

•                     Guacamole Experience: Leverage Guacamole for secure remote access to our systems.

•                     Infrastructure as Code: Use tools like Terraform, Ansible, or CloudFormation to manage on-premises infrastructure.

•                     Monitoring and Alerting: Set up monitoring, logging, and alerting for Kubernetes clusters in our on-premises environment (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack).

•                     Security Best Practices: Implement Kubernetes security measures within our on-premises setup, including RBAC, network policies, and pod security policies.

Our Requirements:

  • Diploma & bachelor’s degree in computer science, Engineering, or related field (or equivalent experience).                    

  • Technical Skills: Proficiency in Kubernetes concepts (pods, services, deployments, stateful sets) within an on-premises context.

  • Experience with Docker and containerd for on-premises container management

  • Experience with on-premises infrastructure and data centers

  • Familiarity with Kubernetes networking (CNI plugins, ingress controllers, service meshes) in an on-premises environment.

  • Knowledge of infrastructure as code tools (e.g., Helm, Kustomize, Terraform) for on-premises deployments.

  • Ability to set up monitoring, logging, and alerting for Kubernetes clusters in an on-premises setup.

  • Understanding of Kubernetes security best practices within an on-premises context.

  • Soft Skills: Strong problem-solving abilities in complex on-premises Kubernetes environments.

  • Excellent communication skills for collaboration with cross-functional teams.

  • Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, on-premises environment.

  • A continuous learning mindset to keep up with the evolving Kubernetes ecosystem.

  • Attention to detail when configuring and managing on-premises Kubernetes resources.

  • Proactive approach to identifying and resolving potential issues within our on-premises systems.

  • [Optional: Relevant certifications, e.g., Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)] will be at an advantage

  • Only Singaporeans to apply as Cat Clearance (Security Clearance) is required in this project.

    EA License No: 09C4235 I EA Reg: R1103307 (Hong Mei Lin)
